subcodes.first_line: Know thou with absolute certitude that the glance of God's loving-kindness, glorified be His majesty, hath ever been directed towards the land of Ṣád [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیقین مبین بدان لحاظ عنایت حق جل جلاله بارض ص بوده و هست در آن ارض
subcodes.subjects: @Shrines and Holy places, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @eulogies; reminiscences, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
